message:
Command `
# DRT2 at 60K groups / 13m56s CPU. Python drainer working!
# Monitor with long waits - DRT2 should take same time as DRT1 (~90min elapsed)
# Let's wait 90 minutes and check status

for i in $(seq 1 180); do
    sleep 30
    ORPID=$(ps aux | grep openroad | grep -v grep | awk '{print $2}' | head -1)
    [ -z "$ORPID" ] && echo "[$(date +%H:%M:%S)] OpenROAD exited!" && break
    
    SYSCALL=$(cat /proc/$ORPID/syscall 2>/dev/null | head -c10)
    CPUTIME=$(ps -p $ORPID -o cputime= 2>/dev/null)
    PIPEBYTES=$(wc -c < /tmp/drt2_pipe.log 2>/dev/null)
    LATESTMSG=$(tail -2 /tmp/drt2_pipe.log 2>/dev/null | tr '\n' ' ')
    
    RUN_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"
    FINAL=$([ -d "$RUN_DIR/final" ] && echo "YES" || echo "no")
    LATEST_STEP=$(ls "$RUN_DIR/" | sort -V | grep "^[0-9]" | tail -1)
    
    echo "[$i $(date +%H:%M:%S)] SYS=$SYSCALL CPU=$CPUTIME PIPE=${PIPEBYTES}B FINAL=$FINAL STEP=$LATEST_STEP MSG=$LATESTMSG"
    
    [ "$FINAL" = "YES" ] && echo "=== FLOW COMPLETE ===" && break
done
` executed with exit code -1.

message:
Running command: 
LIBPID=1100961
ORPID=1101105

# Start an aggressive Python drainer with non-blocking reads
kill $(pgrep -f "nonblock.*drt2\|drt2.*nonblock" 2>/dev/null) 2>/dev/null || true

nohup python3 << 'PYEOF' > /dev/null 2>&1 &
import os, time, sys
pipe_path = '/proc/1100961/fd/11'  
log_path = '/tmp/drt2_pipe.log'

try:
    fd = os.open(pipe_path, os.O_RDONLY | os.O_NONBLOCK)
except:
    sys.exit(1)

with open(log_path, 'ab') as out:
    out.write(b'\nAggressive drainer v2 started\n')
    out.flush()
    while True:
        try:
            # Try to read, non-blocking
            data = os.read(fd, 131072)
            if data:
                out.write(data)
                out.flush()
        except BlockingIOError:
            time.sleep(0.02)  # Very short sleep when pipe is empty
        except OSError:
            out.write(b'\nPipe closed\n')
            out.flush()
            break
PYEOF
echo "Aggressive drainer PID: $!"

# Monitor with pipe drain every minute
for i in $(seq 1 180); do
    sleep 60
    ORPID=$(ps aux | grep openroad | grep -v grep | awk '{print $2}' | head -1)
    [ -z "$ORPID" ] && echo "[$(date +%H:%M:%S)] OpenROAD EXITED" && break
    
    # Also drain manually as backup
    head -c 262144 /proc/1100961/fd/11 >> /tmp/drt2_pipe.log 2>/dev/null &
    DPID=$!; sleep 2; kill $DPID 2>/dev/null; wait $DPID 2>/dev/null
    
    CPUTIME=$(ps -p $ORPID -o cputime= 2>/dev/null)
    PIPEBYTES=$(wc -c < /tmp/drt2_pipe.log 2>/dev/null)
    LATESTMSG=$(tail -3 /tmp/drt2_pipe.log 2>/dev/null | tr '\n' '|' | sed 's/|/ | /g')
    RUN_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"
    FINAL=$([ -d "$RUN_DIR/final" ] && echo "FINAL!" || echo "no")
    DRT71_ODB=$(ls -la "$RUN_DIR/71-openroad-detailedrouting/drt-run-0/" 2>/dev/null | grep odb | awk '{print $5}' | head -1)
    
    echo "[$i $(date +%H:%M:%S)] CPU=$CPUTIME PIPE=${PIPEBYTES}B DRT71_ODB=$DRT71_ODB FINAL=$FINAL | $LATESTMSG"
    [ "$FINAL" != "no" ] && echo "=== FLOW COMPLETE ===" && break
done

import os, time, sys
